features.name: bitwise xnor of identical shift expressions
features.description: Code should include a bitwise XNOR (^~) operation where both operands are identical shift expressions with self-referential shift amount

features.name: right shift by self-referential variable
features.description: Code should include a right shift operation where the shift amount is the same variable being shifted
features.snippet:
logic [3:0] a;
logic [3:0] r = a >> a;

features.name: xnor reduction on identical shifted values
features.description: Code should include XNOR reduction where both arguments are the same computed expression to test constant propagation correctness
